docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AETNA FINANCE CO INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICE SF3 AS TO DEFENDANT PAYTON VIRGINIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAYTON VIRGINIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AETNA FINANCE CO INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICE SF3 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAYTON VIRGINIA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $27.94 ACCRUED INTEREST, $61.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT PAYTON VIRGINIA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PAYTON VIRGINIA
